{
  EmployeeColumnAttributes.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class EmployeeColumnAttributesRegistration
{
    [ModuleInitializer]
    internal static void Register()
    {
        GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "Id", new(Heading: "Employee ID", Order: 1, Format: "0000"));
        GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "Name", new(Heading: "Full Name", Order: 2, Width: 20));
        GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "Email", new(Heading: "Email Address", Width: 30));
        GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "HireDate", new(Order: 3, NullDisplay: "unknown"));
        GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "Notes", new(IsHtml: true));
        GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "Department", new(Filter: true));
        GeneratedColumnAttributes.Register(typeof(global::Employee), "Internal", new(Include: false));
    }
},
  EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions
{
    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> IdColumn<TStyle>(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<TStyle, global::Employee, int>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Id, configuration);

    public static void IdHeadingText<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdOrder<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdWidth<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdHeadingStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdCellStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle, global::Employee, int> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdFormat<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdNullDisplay<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdIsHtml<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Id);

    public static void IdRender<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Func<global::Employee, int, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdFilter<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Id);

    public static void IdInclude<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Id, value);

    public static void IdExclude<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Id);
